title: InputMethodBlocker (Legacy)
description:
(WORKS WITH WINDOWS ONLY)
Allow you to play Minecraft 1.7-1.11.2 with input method enabled
body:
Fix IME conflict with Minecraft. Allow you to play with input method enabled.

**WORKS WITH WINDOWS ONLY**

Rebuild of the project.

**Project discontinued**

Revival of project available at
[https://github.com/CreeperKong/InputMethodBlocker](https://github.com/CreeperKong/InputMethodBlocker)

Original source code available at
[https://github.com/lss233/InputMethodBlocker](https://github.com/lss233/InputMethodBlocker)
